name: github-copilot-workshop
description: Hands-on GitHub Copilot workshop with progressive exercises

scripts.start: echo "GitHub Copilot Workshop — start with exercises/01-setup-and-basics/README.md"
scripts.test: echo "Run tests from individual exercise directories" && exit 0
scripts.day3: echo "Starting Day 3 - Real Apps" && cd exercises/05-real-world-project && npm start
scripts.day4: echo "Day 4 - Creative projects are in your choice of mini-project"
scripts.day5: echo "Day 5 - Polish and present your work!"
scripts.day6: echo "Bonus - Advanced Copilot: custom agents, skills & Playwright MCP" && echo "See exercises/06-advanced-copilot-agents/README.md"

author: GitHub Copilot Hackathon Team
